label_notes: Nextdoor uniquely collects and requires home addresses, creating heightened privacy concerns. The platform's neighborhood-focused model means data has significant location targeting value. Law enforcement requests for neighborhood activity data are a documented concern. Network access prevented direct policy verification - this analysis is based on publicly documented practices and known Nextdoor features.
